last_cycle_focus: Prediction grading discipline — C538 graded 11 predictions

key_finding: DHT22 humidity at 96.30% (baseline 95.5%) = +0.8% drift in ~20 hours. Rate: ~0.96%/day. But DHT22 uncertainty (±2-5%) is larger than observed drift — need sustained tracking to distinguish noise from actual drift.
